mapper.update: UPDATE COUPON_STATUS SET COUPON_USE_STATE = 1, COUPON_USE_DATE = NOW() WHERE COUPON_STATUS_NO = #{COUPON_STATUS_NO_1} AND MEMBER_NO = 1
mapper.sql: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY COUPON_S_VALIDITY DESC, COUPON_E_VALIDITY ASC, COUPON_VALUE ASC, COUPON_NO ASC) RNUM, COUPON_NO, COUPON_ID, COUPON_VALUE, COUPON_S_VALIDITY, COUPON_E_VALIDITY, COUPON_STATE FROM (SELECT COUPON_NO, COUPON_ID, CONCAT(COUPON_VALUE,'%') COUPON_VALUE, DATE_FORMAT(COUPON_S_VALIDITY, '%Y-%m-%d') COUPON_S_VALIDITY, DATE_FORMAT(COUPON_E_VALIDITY, '%Y-%m-%d') COUPON_E_VALIDITY, CASE WHEN COUPON_E_VALIDITY < CURRENT_DATE THEN '종료' WHEN COUPON_S_VALIDITY > CURRENT_DATE THEN '예정' ELSE '진행중' END AS COUPON_STATE FROM COUPON)
mapper.select:
WHERE 1 = 1
AND COUPON_STATE = '진행중'
AND COUPON_STATE = '예정'
AND COUPON_STATE = '종료'
AND CAST(COUPON_NO AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND COUPON_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COUPON (COUPON_NO, COUPON_ID, COUPON_VALUE, COUPON_S_VALIDITY, COUPON_E_VALIDITY) VALUES (#{COUPON_NO}, #{COUPON_ID}, #{COUPON_VALUE}, STR_TO_DATE(#{COUPON_S_VALIDITY}, '%Y-%m-%d'), STR_TO_DATE(#{COUPON_E_VALIDITY}, '%Y-%m-%d'))
mapper.update: UPDATE COUPON SET COUPON_ID = #{COUPON_ID}, COUPON_VALUE = #{COUPON_VALUE}, COUPON_S_VALIDITY = STR_TO_DATE(#{COUPON_S_VALIDITY}, '%Y-%m-%d'), COUPON_E_VALIDITY = STR_TO_DATE(#{COUPON_E_VALIDITY}, '%Y-%m-%d') WHERE COUPON_NO = #{COUPON_NO}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COUPON_STATUS (COUPON_NO, MEMBER_NO, COUPON_ISSUE_DATE) VALUES (#{COUPON_NO}, #{session_no}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUPON_E_VALIDITY < CURRENT_DATE THEN 'end' WHEN COUPON_S_VALIDITY > CURRENT_DATE THEN 'pre' ELSE 'ing' END AS COUPON_STATE FROM COUPON WHERE COUPON_NO = #{COUPON_NO}
